title: Eggplant Moroccan Tagine
description: A rich and flavorful Moroccan-inspired stew made with eggplant, a blend of spices, and a hint of sourness. Perfect for a warm evening.

ingredients.name: Moroccan spice blend
ingredients.notes: Available at most spice stores or online

ingredients.name: Vegetables for garnish (optional)
ingredients.notes: Such as olives, capers, or preserved lemon

instructions: Heat oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add garlic and sauté for 1-2 minutes until fragrant.
Add eggplant and cook for 5-7 minutes until it starts to soften.
Add spice blend and stir to combine.
Add lemon juice and stir to combine.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for 10-15 minutes until eggplant is tender.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Garnish with parsley and serve over couscous or rice.
